framework.name: Visa Agentic Tokenization
framework.description: Visa has a specific 'agentic tokenization' capability distinct from standard card tokenization — purpose-built for agent-initiated payment flows. This is separate from their existing network tokenization and suggests agent-specific credential handling.
framework.raw_quote: Visa's suite of essential agentic commerce tools, including authentication, agentic tokenization, and user intent capture

source.title: Introducing Visa Intelligent Commerce on AWS: Enabling agentic commerce with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Artificial Intelligence
